title: Extend deterministic secretary status projection
goal: Extend read-only status projection to provide the secretary-like overview without model-maintained Bureau state.

acceptance.assertion: The projection includes per-repository active balls and blockers.
The projection shows deterministic next safe actions derived from queue, registry, GitHub and state-store facts.
The projection explicitly states it does not establish completion, merge readiness, runtime correctness or AI authority.

metadata.advance_reason: BUREAU-DETERMINISTIC-OPS-V1-T005 is verified by this registry state; the next deterministic hardening ball is deterministic secretary status projection.

verified_acceptance.projection-active-balls: PR #306 adds repository_balls to status_projection, derived from registry resources, task claims and runtime active runs; same-repo ambiguity is a blocker finding.
verified_acceptance.projection-next-actions: PR #306 adds next_actions derived from projection blockers, repository ambiguity, queue lane, registry state and task blockers; actions are read-only recommendations, not dispatch authority.
verified_acceptance.projection-no-authority: PR #306 exposes authority_boundary.ai and keeps ai_authority in does_not_establish; tests verify defensive copying of the AI boundary.

validation: PR #306 CI validate succeeded for Python 3.10 and 3.12 before merge.
Local validation before PR creation: PYTHONPATH=src make validate -> 410 passed.
